entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `courseId` TEXT NOT NULL, `activityName` TEXT NOT NULL, `extension` TEXT NOT NULL, `template` TEXT NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_file_rename_rules_courseId_activityName_extension
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_file_rename_rules_courseId_activityName_extension` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`courseId`, `activityName`, `extension`)
